title: Aurora Relay Grid: Corner-Free Placement on the Ice Torus
strategies: single-row / single-diagonal baseline (linear number of relays)
difference-set product with a small progression-free set (a few diagonals)
search for a large progression-free difference set A, then product T = {(x,y): (x-y) mod n in A}
direct 2D greedy that adds cells while keeping the set corner-free
